concept: Craft me a platformer where the player is a spark of light traveling through an abandoned network of fiber optic cables and electronic devices. Navigate through deteriorating technological infrastructure, activating long-dormant systems and restoring connectivity to the network. Redirect light paths using mirrors, prisms, and other optical elements to access blocked pathways and activate power-dependent mechanisms. Uncover fragmented data logs that reveal the catastrophe that led to the network's abandonment and your origin as an artificial consciousness backup.
